programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Georgia on My Shine
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Mark and Digger uncover Popcorn's most prolific still in Georgia while Mike plots payback on a rival. Later, Tim and Tickle figure out what to do with their backwoods shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: New Bootlegger in Town
programme.desc: Mike confronts Daniel about stealing his customers. Tickle, Henry and Kenny scale up their CBD moonshine operation. Mark and Digger get an unexpected offer from a credible new bootlegger. Distillers go head to head to make the best American Whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Runs Again
programme.desc: Moonshine's prodigal son, Tickle, returns from a year in jail to the Appalachian backwoods. With long-time partner, Tim, determined to stay legal, Tickle recruits an old friend to make an inaugural run of shine and re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: New Bootlegger in Town
programme.desc: Mike confronts Daniel about stealing his customers. Tickle, Henry and Kenny scale up their CBD moonshine operation. Mark and Digger get an unexpected offer from a credible new bootlegger. Distillers go head to head to make the best American Whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: American Spirits
programme.desc: Moonshine season is in session. Shine is in demand and the law is on the hunt. Tim faces a dilemma that jeopardizes his legal business. Jeff, Mark and Lance aim to double their profits while the law threatens to end Josh and Bill's season early.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Burn
programme.desc: It's the first weeks of shine season, and outlaws are eager to turn a profit before the cops close in. Josh and Bill try to get a head start at a heritage shine site but their first run leaves a bitter taste. Jeff and Lance scope out the competition.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rocky Mountain Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew kick off an epic new mining season in the historic hills of Montana. After a freak accident nearly derails their expedition from the start, they rally and find the first big gold of the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Breeder
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty with some fainting goats, breeding exotic insects, while helping to remove tree stumps. Mike decides to take on the dirty jobs that other do day in and day out.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Vanished Empire
programme.desc: On the Mediterranean island of Crete, the Minoans built one of the most glorious civilizations in the ancient world and then mysteriously vanished. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how Europe's first superpower disappeared.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Atlantis Case
programme.desc: For centuries, experts and archeologists have tried to pinpoint the lost city of Atlantis, but all have failed. Now Rob Riggle is on the case, and Atlantis has nowhere left to hide.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Shay Way
programme.desc: Jamiee and her fiancée Lisa are shopping together. To keep the brides from seeing their final looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise. Can wedding planner Michelle let go and enjoy being the bride? Shay confronts Randy about the elephant in the room.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: The Client Is Randy Fenoli!
programme.desc: Randy surprises his next bride who isn't yet ready to commit to a dress.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Amends Between Friends
programme.desc: Ryan surprises Whitney with a hefty business proposition and she is forced to get on board or miss the opportunity of a lifetime. Meanwhile, Buddy sits Whitney down to make amends.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: When Whitney and Todd hatch an exciting new business plan, Ryan's negative reaction threatens to derail not only their upcoming trip to Paris but also Whitney's performance at the North Carolina State Weightlifting Championships.

programme.desc: Jazz faces the most intense pressure in her life as she cannot handle the reality of preparing her valedictorian speech for high school graduation; JoJo has a change of heart about top surgery and pursues bottom surgery; Jazz shops for a new Harvard look.

programme.desc: Just as Robyn's family has adjusted to Flagstaff they learn that the owner is selling their rental house and they have 60 days to leave. Robyn and Kody fight in front of the kids over it and Aurora has a full-on panic attack, perhaps her worst ever.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: It's Life or Death
programme.desc: Amanda undergoes bariatric surgery in the hopes of losing enough weight to treat her cancer. Casey meets with Dr. Procter and is told he'll die if he doesn't lose weight. Later, the family has a pool party and Casey confronts Ed over his name-calling.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: Casey reaches a boiling point with his parents when they blame his morbid obesity on video games. Amanda starts having pains post-surgery that send her to the E.R. Amy makes major lifestyle changes in the hopes of being approved for surgery.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Sara
programme.desc: Sara is a breast-cancer survivor who had a double mastectomy, decided against reconstructive surgery, and lost 90 pounds. Her makeover takes an unexpected twist.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Miriam
programme.desc: Miriam needs to find a hip and modern style that helps her to be taken seriously.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Diving for Dollars
programme.desc: With their wedding only days away, frugal couple Anne Marie and Peter save a fortune by dumpster diving for decorations. NYC Bartender Anthony looks for an apartment and refuses to spend anywhere near the rent of pricey New York apartments.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Doctors Are the Worst Patients
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident as a child, Heather's ankle was rebuilt from parts of her body. Now it's up to Dr. Vincent to help her walk again. Dr. Schaeffer sees a comedian with not-so-funny feet, and phones a friend to get his own foot treated.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Abscessive Compulsive
programme.desc: Elise is tormented by leaking abscesses, Onique can feel the people staring at the lump on her ear, Dr. Emma performs the newly named 'Victor Technique' on a man plagued by bumps, and Aria's beard is the only thing standing in the way of her femininity.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frat Boy Blues
programme.desc: An entire fraternity is plagued with blue urine; a pregnant woman may lose her baby to a tiny terror; and a man returns from a trip abroad with a souvenir that nearly costs him his life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Can't Stop Itching
programme.desc: A man's itchy rash turns out to be more than just poison oak; a young woman is bleeding profusely from the inside of her lip.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy and Karina
programme.desc: Tamy faces a tough choice when her husband wants her back but only if she moves away from Houston and Dr. Now's program. Karina's weight loss begins to slow, but she finds happiness dating a guy Dr. Now is surprised to see in his clinic again.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Robert's Story
programme.desc: With the support of his fiancé, Kathryn, Robert turns to Dr. Nowzaradan in a final, desperate attempt to save his life. He tries to reverse a lifelong food addiction that has left him bed-bound, saddled with grotesque lymphedema, and nearly 900-lbs.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Luis and Sydney

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rachael and Vance

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney and Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney previously cut things off with Isaak, a guy she met online. Isaak won't let up, and is doing everything he can to reel Courtney back in. Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to make sure Isaak leaves Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Siesta Key: What if It Goes Completely South?

programme.title: Siesta Key: Where Did You Sleep Last Night?
programme.desc: Juliette and Chloe are worried that Amanda is fully Team Alex. Alyssa is suspicious about what went on in Nashville between Juliette and Alex. Madisson meets up with Ish after their break up. Juliette reveals a huge secret.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeremy Meeks

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Christina Milian

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXIII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: DJ Paul

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Grossness
programme.desc: In an al l -new episode Nina is joined by Melvin, B. Simone and Brandon to perform a 'liquid exorcism', spy on some 'gross encounters' and play a little game of 'shock and aww'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: WTFness II
programme.desc: James Davis, Hennessy, Reginae Carter, and Spencer Pratt, head underground with 'sub-humans', keep calm with 'does someone need a hug', and get medically curious in 'what's happening to my body?'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: WTFness
programme.desc: James Davis, Hennessy, Reginae Carter, and Johnny Bananas dive in the deep end of internet weirdness with 'you collect what?', create some 'art school F's', and get down with 'deep cuts'.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kristina and Faith
programme.desc: When Kristina met Faith in a chatroom, she didn't intend to fall in love and betray her IRL fiancé. Now Nev and co-host Tallulah Willis navigate a treacherous love triangle as they embark on an epic hunt to find the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Catherine and Graham

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mary and Adam
programme.desc: A previous catfish comes to Nev and Max for assistance after they find online love. Either this catfish is playing games with Nev and Max, or getting a taste of their own fishy ways.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chelsea and Charles

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Danny and Rosa
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a family with his beautiful online love, despite her violent past. When he enlists Nev and Max to help him finally meet her in person, they soon discover she may have ties to a former Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha and Jacqueline

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim and Matt

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mecca and Tanner

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Derek and Kristen
programme.desc: After some bad luck with girls, Derek meets Kristen on Facebook. After developing a deep love for each other, Derek's ready to meet her, but Kristen always has an excuse.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Truth and Ray'Quan
programme.desc: L.A. fashion designer Truth is hot for his online crush Ray'Quan despite the fact he's in a relationship IRL.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robert and Ashleigh

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Fans' Choice

programme.title: Unearthed: New York's Greatest Wonders

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dark World of Secret Societies

programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets

What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Is Burning
programme.desc: Military analysts are concerned about a possible smoke screen over North Korea. Then, amateur archaeologists have discovered what could be two forgotten pyramids in Egypt via satellite image.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist stumbles upon strange symbols scratched into the Kazakhstan Desert. CIA surveillance photographs show what looks like a giant Star of David on the island of Cuba. A lake in the Brazilian rain forest has turned bright pink.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Beasts of the Lost Jungle
programme.desc: A ghost town covered in a strange, white powder emerges from a lake in Argentina. When a lost jungle is discovered in Africa, scientists embark on a dangerous mission to explore it. A declassified CIA image uncovers a bizarre, giant Soviet weapon.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Skyscraper vs. Sinkhole

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell

programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Twisted: The Killer Next Door
programme.desc: The Bike Path Rapist terrorized the city of Buffalo for three decades. One part Mr. Normal, and one part Homicidal Maniac, no one knows he's living the life of a beloved pillar of the community.

programme.title: Twisted: Trail of Fears
programme.desc: California state parks became scenes of violence in 1979 and 1980 as convicted rapist David Carpenter took his crimes to a new and diabolic level, by brutally killing his victims.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Hate and Fury
programme.desc: When three synagogues simultaneously go up in flames, federal agents work around the clock to solve the arsons. They get an unexpected break when a double murder 150 miles away reveals new evidence - and a sinister plot of bigotry, fire and fury.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Bugs Bunny Defense
programme.desc: A woman claims she accidentally shot her husband when they were re-enacting a moment from a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: Go inside the mind of a serial rapist hunting his victims while two detectives were hunting him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in the Sutton Place Apartment?
programme.desc: It's a story of wealth, privilege, and an early morning after-party that went terribly wrong. Erin Moriarty explores the last night of Joey Comunale's life and the cases against two privileged young men for taking part in a murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends… but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal
programme.desc: Yelena Zakin's dream life is upturned by her husband Andrew's interest in his new, scheming secretary, her strange fiancé, and Andrew's ambitious protégé. For Yelena, it's a lethal combination.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Everything We Had Leftover
programme.desc: To complete her bungalow rehab, Nicole must finish the remaining rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Yellow and Brown Mess
programme.desc: Nicole finds another house in an up and coming neighbourhood that needs her attention. Fighting the onset of colder weather, she must first tackle an exterior makeover, replacing the icky yellow and brown paint job.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Sensational Second Floor
programme.desc: The bedrooms and bathroom on the second floor desperately need Nicole's attention. She must deal with water-damaged walls, old carpet and vinyl covering the hardwood, and a tiny, dirty bathroom that needs an updated shower.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Park-n-Shop Grocery Store
programme.desc: The crew heads to Mike's hometown of Charlotte, North Carolina, to check out the signage they can save from his very first job. Mike and Robert check out the Virginia Transportation Museum and learn that a bank has a need for a conference table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Storybook Style House
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels south to Winston Salem, North Carolina to save what they can from this storybook style home in two days. They get some unique chandeliers, sinks, and windows from this Robert Byrd house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Elks National Home
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to the Elks National Home in Bedford, VA, to salvage parts of the old lodge. Back in the woodshop, Mike builds a swing from a salvaged apple crate and upholsters cushions from old postal bags.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Terracotta Silo
programme.desc: The Dawgs struggle to take down a terracotta silo in Bedford, VA. While in town, Mike takes Tay and Grayson to visit the National D-Day Memorial. Back at the shop, Mike builds a coffee table from an old factory cart.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Geyser Gulch at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items this time include a birdhouse, oversized frying pans, and water guns. Back at the warehouse, Mike builds a garden arbor out of two doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: P.A. Denny Riverboat
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a calliope from a riverboat in Parkersburg, WV. They also split into teams to pick through the owner's large warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wheeling Apartment
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the rest of the team salvage elements from an apartment building in Wheeling, WV. Key items include arched doors, a double drain board sink and wooden medallions.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: American Viscose Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a kiln from the American Viscose Plant in Roanoke, VA. Mike and Tay work together to build custom tables for a local optometrist office. Will Farmer also returns to appraise a map from 1853.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Tully Choice Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs save steps and chimney rocks from a 1765 log cabin at Smith Mountain Lake. Gracie takes the team to a local glassblowing artist to make pieces for a chandelier. Robert and Ted also pick through a barn.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Scott Boulevard Baptist Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Decatur, GA, to salvage the Scott Boulevard Baptist Church. Key items include arched doorways and large stained glass windows. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build an iron console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cast Iron Storefront
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage a cast iron storefront in Vicksburg, MS. Mike and Tay also work together to build a custom table for country music duo Thompson Square.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Drayton Mill
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Skylar is about to celebrate her 16th birthday, and is at odds with her mom, Donna, over the perfect design for the cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Shower Struggle
programme.desc: Nijah and Dwayne prepare to bring their baby girl into the world, the parents and grandma-to-be have different ideas for the baby shower cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Baker for the Bikers
programme.desc: Rick is the owner of custom bike shop Strokers Dallas, and is throwing a big party to celebrate 20 successful years in business. He brings along his right hand ladies to help him pick the anniversary cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Glamping Wedding
programme.desc: Dan and Brittany are three weeks away from walking down the aisle with 150 guests.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Bil Ol' Cake
programme.desc: Janna, Sally and Jennifer are longtime employees of Southfork Ranch, known worldwide as the Ewing ranch from the TV series 'Dallas.' Southfork is planning their biggest event of the year with 500 people attending.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Snow In Dallas
programme.desc: Kirsten and Marcus are getting married in a few weeks, and are on the hunt for the perfect cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Glowing, Patriotic Cakes
programme.desc: Guests of a Vegas party go hog wild for a chocolate stout cake while a little girl's birthday dreams come true as her favorite pink-haired character comes to life.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Leprechaun and Mermaid Cakes
programme.desc: A giant leprechaun cake completes a St. Patrick's Day party while one bride's floral fairytale becomes a reality with 2,600 edible homemade flowers. Plus, savory dishes that look like anything but cake are stacked extra high.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Cookies and Feather Cakes
programme.desc: An artist's style turns edible when one baker sculpts a sweet wonderland, then the Los Angeles Cookie Con gets a special treat that's stacked higher than the attendees' heads.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Ostriches, Tacos and Groundhogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: A flightless bird of epic proportions comes to life in Dallas while taco fillings are piled high on a giant confectionary shell. Next, it's an extraordinary Sweet 16 when the birthday girl's face is reimagined on a cake.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Good Eats: Mussel Bound

programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions

programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Revealing Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to Africa to get up close and personal with a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer where humans came from.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure while chasing the legend of Queen Boudica, the Celtic queen who nearly defeated the Roman army.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Buzzard's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases a lost treasure, rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars. Later, team Expedition X takes a risky helicopter flight to investigate a mountain peak known for UFO sightings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Great Women of Egypt
programme.desc: Josh journeys through the land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of three of the most powerful, and most elusive, women in ancient Egypt: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Buzzard's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases a lost treasure, rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars. Later, team Expedition X takes a risky helicopter flight to investigate a mountain peak known for UFO sightings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Nazi Code
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the former Third Reich in search of an elusive Nazi fortune hidden with a code allegedly created by Hitler's private secretary, and embedded into a piece of sheet music.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: Josh joins leading archeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, the lost colony of Roanoke. Following newly discovered clues, he'll reach new heights as he digs for answers to this over 400-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Isolated in the jungle of an uninhabited Hawaiian island, Joe and Cody lock heads over priorities.

programme.title: Dual Survival: The Green Hell
programme.desc: Joe and Cody learn how to stay alive on the world's deadliest river, if they can keep from killing each other first.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Meltdown
programme.desc: Stranded in the middle of Zambia's hot, wild plains, Joe and Cody must avoid territorial hippos and herds of elephants to find water and shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: Isolated beneath the mountains of Romania, lost in a labyrinth of underground caves, Joe and Cody fight to escape the pitch black darkness with dying headlamps.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Robert's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tommy's Story
programme.desc: Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée and have the life he always dreamed of with her, but to break the cycle of pathological eating that left him nearly bed-bound, he'll have to face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted

programme.title: Save My Skin: Scrape It Off
programme.desc: Rachel's body is covered in hundreds of squishy bumps, Paul has a giant lump on his back, John's nose has grown completely out of control, and Lili the entertainer wants a date, but is afraid that the dangling growth on her face will scare men off.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: Cold Feet

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: St. James Hotel
programme.desc: Zak, Nick and Aaron travel to the St. James Hotel in New Mexico that once hosted Wild West legends like Jesse James and Buffalo Bill. Aaron locks himself inside a room so haunted the hotel padlocks it shut from the public.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Heritage Junction
programme.desc: The team explores the remains of the historic Heritage Junction, located near Los Angeles.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Old Town San Diego
programme.desc: The trio enter into a multi-part lockdown in Old Town San Diego to investigate the raucous spirits from wild parties dating back almost two centuries ago. There, they visit the Cosmo Hotel and La Casa De Estudillo.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Old Charleston Jail
programme.desc: Zak, Nick and Aaron enter the Old Charleston Jail to investigate the site of the first US female serial killer's public execution. The guys invite the Music Video Mashup Contest winners into this unprecedented lockdown with them.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Return to Tombstone
programme.desc: The team returns to Tombstone, Arizona, to investigate Big Nose Kate’s Saloon, a place tormented by a spirit known only as the Swamper. First, the guys stop by the Bird Cage Theatre and pay their respects to a friend who was tragically shot and killed.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: McRaven Mansion
programme.desc: Zak and the crew are called upon by the mayor of Vicksburg, Mississippi, to explore the Siege of Vicksburg and its lasting impact on the city. Their first stop is McRaven Mansion, widely considered to be the most haunted building in the South.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Demons And Dolls
programme.desc: Zak and the crew continue their exploration of Vicksburg, MS, by investigating a demonic presence at a hair salon that was hit by cannon fire during the Civil War. They also investigate an antique doll museum said to contain dolls that come alive.

programme.title: Project Runway: The Ultimate Upcycle
programme.desc: In Project Runway's first upcycling challenge, the materials used for the look will be donated clothing from a local Goodwill. The designers will need to be resourceful, sustainable, and fast because it's also their first one day challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway: Sew 80's
programme.desc: The iconic Cyndi Lauper is both inspiration and guest judge for this totally tubular team challenge. Split into two teams, the designers must create cohesive mini-collections to pay homage to Cyndi's 80's fashion trailblazing that brought Punk mainstream.

programme.title: Project Runway: There Is Only One You
programme.desc: The designers are given a chance to think about their family history and channel those stories and emotions into a look of their choosing. Luckily, there's a surprise early on that will help boost their chances for success in the challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway: Project Runway x Ashley Longshore
programme.desc: Collaborations between fashion designers and artists are all the rage. In this challenge the designers work with the latest art darling, Ashley Longshore. Her pop art, turned into one-of-a-kind prints, gives the runway some of the season's boldest looks.

programme.title: Project Runway: Live and Let Tie Dye

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Ram Dao

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Jian Sword

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Spanish Conquistador Sword

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Chinese War Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths must not only free their tools from a steel grate but forge a knife from it. After intense testing, only two will head home in order to recreate a Chinese War Sword.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bikes and Blades

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Wright Stuff
programme.desc: An 1830s percussion musket from West Point marches into the shop. A guy soars in with a collection of letters and pilot licenses signed by the father of flight, Orville Wright.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Kick the Can
programme.desc: A World Series ring from the 1995 Atlanta Braves slides into the shop. Corey and the Old Man hear the sweet sound of cash when a Sho-Bud steel guitar comes in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: One Way Ticket
programme.desc: A seller brings in a gold record signed by the band KISS. A confederate pinfire revolver marches into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Room and Hoard
programme.desc: Chumlee checks out a gold video game cartridge from the 1990 Nintendo World Championships.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Anytime, Any Mace
programme.desc: Prepare for battle with the Pawn Stars as Rick checks out a medieval mace. Will it be a fair fight for this primitive weapon or is he in for a low blow? Then, Rick and the Old Man check out a set of cap guns from the 1950s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Promissory Pawn
programme.desc: A water propelled jetpack; a promissory note from the Mexican-American War;a statue of the Hindu god Shiva.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: The rarest Hot Wheels car in the world arrives at the shop as well as an etching by Rembrandt. Also, Chum decides he wants to write his memoirs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Emperor
programme.desc: A 44 BC Roman coin, a rare 1960s leather jacket, plaster casts of Joe DiMaggio's feet, a scarlet fever sign.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Death and Taxidermy
programme.desc: Get spooked out with the Pawn Stars when a 1547 edition of 'The Dance of Death' haunts the shop. Next, things get whimsical when two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' unorthodox taxidermy collection are brought in. A tear-gas baton forces its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Seas
programme.desc: Rick explores a big deal with Captain Cook's sea map, while Chumlee haggles for a prop from Saturday Night Live, and Corey wrestles to win an autographed piece of WWE star Roddy Piper's merchandise. Then, Rick calls Rick Dale to check out an antique bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Bombsight for Sore Eyes

programme.title: Swamp People: The Champ

programme.desc: Special access to an elite powerboat-racing championship reveals the cutting-edge technology behind the world's fastest boats. These super-fast vessels are expertly engineered to almost fly.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: World's Greatest Football Stadium
programme.desc: Richard Hammond goes behind-the-scenes of a new, ground-breaking football stadium to uncover how hi-tech engineering created this cutting-edge innovation. It's a retractable soccer field that rolls back to reveal a world-first NFL field.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Mega Machines: World's Fastest Boats
programme.desc: Special access to an elite powerboat-racing championship reveals the cutting-edge technology behind the world's fastest boats. These super-fast vessels are expertly engineered to almost fly.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: World's Greatest Football Stadium
programme.desc: Richard Hammond goes behind-the-scenes of a new, ground-breaking football stadium to uncover how hi-tech engineering created this cutting-edge innovation. It's a retractable soccer field that rolls back to reveal a world-first NFL field.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: NYC Mega Tower
programme.desc: The skinniest skyscraper in the world will soon become New York's third tallest, and using an innovative, gravity-defying design, this colossal megastructure is breaking all the rules of engineering.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: The Spreckels Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, dissects the suspicious death of Rebecca Zahau, girlfriend of multi-millionaire pharmaceutical tycoon, Jonah Shaknai. When Rebecca's body was found, law enforcement determined her death was a suicide.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Blood Lust
programme.desc: The city of Atlanta is gripped with fear as a deadly killer prowls the streets for unsuspecting victims with a powerful gun.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Critical Care
programme.desc: When a caretaker reports her 63-year-old cancer patient missing, detectives research leads to solve the mystery.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Mother

programme.title: American Justice: A Deadly Dose
