programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Fallen Brother
programme.desc: The city is in mourning after a well-loved Police officer is shot and killed on duty.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Field
programme.desc: On the morning of July 5th, the body of a victim is found in an abandoned lot that had been used to shoot off guns the night before in celebration in Independence Day. More than 60 shell casings are collected from the crime scene.

programme.title: Crime 360: At Death's Door
programme.desc: It's a race against time to identify a murder suspect before he disappears for good.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother, The Devil
programme.desc: Wallace Jeffs was raised to believe that his half-brother, Warren, would guide his family to salvation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: In a quiet Southern town, police find a prominent lawyer brutally murdered and his girlfriend bound in duct tape. Investigators pursue a long list of leads, until they zero in on a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Bringing Brooke Home
programme.desc: Dateline explores the abduction of 19-year-old Oregon student Brooke Wilberger and how a similar abduction in New Mexico helped crack the case. The report includes interviews with family members and former New Mexico governor Bill Richardson.

programme.title: Gone: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Charlotte Moriarty and her infant son take a five-minute stroll to the market on the small island of Oahu, Hawaii, and never come home. It will take more than 30 years to find out what happened to the mother and baby on the day that they vanished.

programme.title: Disappeared: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Mother of three, Holly Cantrell, is seen on security video exiting the Oklahoma hospital where she works but never returns home. Police learn Holly was keeping secrets, and her loved ones wonder if those had anything to do with her disappearance.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Vanishing Hour
programme.desc: 19 year old Tyarra Williams vanishes from the parking lot of her Greensboro, North Carolina apartment complex. When tips suggest that Tyarra may have fallen prey to human trafficking, her grandfather embarks on a cross country search for answers.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former First National Bank
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, NC. Key items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. At the shop, Robert builds a bar out of a boat salvaged from Smith Mountain Lake.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rising Sun Ranch
programme.desc: The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, WV. Key items salvaged include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trenton Central High School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team takes on a huge high school in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk in the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.desc: Chris Lambton and his crew transform a dilapidated yard into a massive outdoor room, including an oversized bamboo deck, a custom bar made from wine barrels and a living wall full of colorful plants.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Will Work for Beer: Tables for a Local Brewery
programme.desc: The West End Salvage team is asked to create tables for a local brewery. Inspired by the nearby bike trail, they deconstruct vintage bikes to incorporate handlebars, wheels and more into moveable tables.

programme.title: West End Salvage: When in Doubt, Expand a Table That Is
programme.desc: Using some ingenuity from the early twentieth century, some salvage from Iowa farms, and some old fashioned elbow grease, the guys come up with a fantastic solution for seating in a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Guys Turn a Vintage Travel Trunk Into a Shelving Unit
programme.desc: The guys turn a trunk into a shelving unit while preserving as much history as possible.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Crew Salvage Organ Pipes for a Multi-Functional Desk and Dividing Screen
programme.desc: After meeting with two clients who run a yoga studio out of their downtown loft, Don and Hal draw up plans to create a multi-functional dividing screen and desk made of church organ pipes they often have at the shop.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Crew Use Vintage Metal Chicken Coops as the Foundation for a Client's Sewing Deck
programme.desc: After salvaging a round window from a one-hundred year old home, Don tasks Rex with turning it into a coffee table that will make him at least $600. The whole team pitches in to convert a vintage wooden phone booth into wine display and storage.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Guys At West End Use An Old Piano In Two Different Builds
programme.desc: Don gets the deal of a lifetime when a loyal customer drops by with an old, broken piano. The customer wants Don to create a coffee table from the top of the instrument, and in return, Don gets to keep the rest of the piece to do with as he pleases.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Guys Break a Piece of 300 Year-Old Glass While Making a Custom Table
programme.desc: The team is hired to build a dining room table using 300-year-old windows and shutters. The windows are much larger than expected and the only solution is to trim down the shutters and cut the glass to size.

programme.title: West End Salvage: A Small Space Expands Into a Spacious Floor Plan
programme.desc: Scott and Kenny want their living and dining room area restructured.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The West End Salvage Team Creates The Ultimate Bachelor Pad
programme.desc: Daniel doesn't know what to do with his tiny eight hundred square foot downtown loft. He wants his place to function as a living room, dining room and home office, so he's hired the team at West End Salvage.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The West End Salvage Team Brings A Bohemian Look To A Master Bedroom
programme.desc: Joe and Rachel are looking for a big change in their master bedroom, but are stumped.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bar-B-Que
programme.desc: Food network stars reveal the best bbq they've eaten.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Totally Fried
programme.desc: Food network stars reveal the best fried foods they've eaten.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Out
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is going hog wild for the most insane pig roasts in the country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Top 5 Bbq Between Bread
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is letting barbecue pork sandwiches hog the spotlight.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hand-Held Eats
programme.desc: The meals are hand-held at these popular hotspots, but the unique flavors are the main attraction. Authentic Mexican cuisine pioneer Rick Bayless celebrates Mexico's most beloved street food and delicious snacks.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Adventure
programme.desc: We take you on a gastro-tour of some of the most adventurous efforts in dining today.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Food Fantasy
programme.desc: Imagination roams free at these amazing dining spots.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Great Spaces
programme.desc: Take a tour of the most unique places and spaces in dining today. From a food truck serving the most delectable Korean/Mexican dishes on four wheels, to a LEED-certified bowling-alley-come-music-venue boasting it's own special Blue Ribbon menu.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Italian
programme.desc: Classic Italian meets passion, authenticity and innovation at these noteworthy restaurants. Vetri has been called one of the best Italian restaurants in America, presenting simple, fresh, authentic Italian dishes.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: All-Day Brunch/ Jerk Chicken/ Cupcakes
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts out at Nashville's Sucker Brunch truck, where Chef Michael Gilbert's celebration of breakfast comes in a grits dish topped with smoked Andouille sausage, caramelized onions and spinach.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Shrimp Tacos, Mofongo and Stuffed Pita
programme.desc: Brad heads to Malibu, California, to find a shrimp-centric food truck whose tempura-battered Baja shrimp tacos take the crave-able crustacean to the next level. Next, he travels to Los Angeles to try out a one-of-a-kind, homestyle Puerto Rican mofongo.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Atlanta, Georgia, where he finds the Deep South Biscuit Co. truck delivering fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rib-a-Licious
programme.desc: Roger's on the hunt for lip-smacking barbecue ribs and he found two places where the racks of meat stack up to perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!
programme.desc: Nothing grabs Roger's attention like a raging wood-burning fire. After the flames subside and the smoke clears, there's a spectacular feast that everyone can dive into. Roger heads to Bigmista's Barbecue & Sammich Shop.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Good Eats: What's Up Duck?
programme.desc: Alton ponders thermodynamics as he makes duck in his quest to make duck a regular dish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Three Chips for Sister Marsha
programme.desc: Alton reveals the secrets of baking the perfect cookie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Calgary Stampede
programme.desc: At the Calgary Stampede, Noah Cappe indulges in a slice of pizza loaded with edible insects.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hey Now, You're a Brawl Star
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Art of the Blade
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Tiny Dancer
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Wrapture/ Becoming Klaus
programme.desc: Mavis needs to quickly replace Pedro's mummy wraps, which were accidently destroyed. A random selection, however, proves problematic as Pedro's personality is transformed. Mavis needs a fang transplant and her cousin Klaus offers to help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Buggin' Out/ How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
programme.desc: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs. Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Whoa-Oh, I'm On A Roll
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Two
programme.desc: While Anya steps up to embrace being the Spider-Girl, Spider-Man enters Mysterio's funhouse and learns that there's a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.title: Movie: Shutter Island
programme.desc: US Marshal Teddy Daniels is sent to a remote island to investigate the disappearance of a murderess who has escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane. While on the island, the US marshal begins to uncover a sick plot.

programme.title: Movie: Valkyrie
programme.desc: A plot to assassinate Hitler begins when German officers and politicians see the downfall of Germany coming. All is arranged, but things start to go wrong and turn the plan into a tragedy.

programme.desc: HBO Sports presents unfiltered conversation and debate from the biggest names in sports.

programme.title: Women of Troy

programme.desc: Explores the life and career of college dropout and creative entrepreneur, Steve Jobs.

programme.title: Movie: The Favourite

programme.title: Movie: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Country music superstar Jackson Maine thinks that he's found the solution to his drinking problem when he finds happiness with an up-and-coming young singer-songwriter, but when her career begins to eclipse his he falls back into his old habits.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer

programme.title: Movie: Faster

programme.title: Movie: The Upside
programme.desc: After his wife and children are killed in a horrific accident, a grieving scientist turns to human cloning and cutting-edge robotics to bring them back to life in a series of unethical experiments that have far-reaching and unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Movie: Captive State
programme.desc: A resistance group struggles to overcome a decade-long alien invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Species
programme.desc: The product of a top-secret experiment, Sil possesses dangerous characteristics, changing from a beautiful woman to a bloodthirsty alien in seconds. Now a team of scientists and mercenaries must find and destroy her before she finds a mate and breeds.

programme.title: Movie: Species II
programme.desc: An astronaut tries to create a brood of mutant children after being infected with alien DNA.

programme.title: Movie: Species III
programme.desc: An alien gives birth to a daughter, Sara, who is sent to wreak havoc on Earth.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: DOMINICAN LEPRECHAUN
programme.desc: Desus and Mero welcome illustrious guest Wale.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: A naive college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices strain their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: I Feel Pretty

programme.title: Movie: Five Feet Apart
programme.desc: Teenagers suffering from cystic fibrosis fall for one another at a hospital.

programme.title: Movie: Trumbo
programme.desc: Dalton Trumbo is blacklisted by Hollywood for his political views, so he works to circumvent his exile by ghostwriting some of the most celebrated films of his time.

programme.title: Movie: Adrift

programme.desc: A family finds themselves among thousands of victims and strangers in a natural catastrophe.

programme.desc: A young husband and wife move into their dream home in the Napa Valley, but their dreams are transformed into nightmares when the home's previous owner refuses to stay out of their lives.

programme.desc: Six complete strangers all receive invitations to test out a new escape room, with $1 million up for grabs if they can find their way out, but once inside they discover that its puzzles are sadistically designed and are killing them off one by one.

programme.title: Movie: The Intruder
programme.desc: A young husband and wife move into their dream home in the Napa Valley, but their dreams are transformed into nightmares when the home's previous owner refuses to stay out of their lives.

programme.title: Movie: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A man's family is kidnapped while on a sailing trip and he is confronted by the people responsible: intelligence agents looking to recover a briefcase.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mercury Rising

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hunt for Hidden Gold

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker vs. Backhoe

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Alone
programme.desc: Fall continues in the bush as the Last Alaskans settle into wilderness solitude. Battling loneliness, Bob Harte welcomes a visitor to his cabin. The Seldens bask in the glory of a major triumph, while Ray Lewis is just beginning the hunt for meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: As the brutal arctic winter takes hold, Heimo is still in search of a moose. The Selden's hope for success on their trapline, but an unwelcome guest may prove to be a threat. A young newcomer builds a cabin on the refuge.

programme.title: Yukon Men: On the Edge: Protect the Town
programme.desc: Stan reunites with an old friend and undergoes a risky mining operation. Joey fends off a pack of bears stalking the town, while Courtney risks her life protecting her family.

programme.title: Yukon Men: On the Edge: Protect the Town
programme.desc: Stan reunites with an old friend and undergoes a risky mining operation. Joey fends off a pack of bears stalking the town, while Courtney risks her life protecting her family.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Home Again
programme.desc: With summer fading and trapping season around the corner, Heimo Korth works to build a new cabin for his family. The Seldens settle in and look to fill their larder with moose meat, while the Lewis family attempts to reach an old homestead by boat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Only the Strong
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin. Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Outback to Hollywood

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppy Power
programme.desc: Little Roo is the smallest of a litter of Beagles, but proves to his much bigger sisters that he is top dog. A litter of super fluffy Bichon Frise pups follow mom's path to show dog stardom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Wildcat!
programme.desc: Brian and Carre are overwhelmed and at a loss when they realize they're fostering a wild feral cat. Garret and Jenny have their hands full with Duff: a cat that goes from pleasant to vicious with zero warning.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nine Lives
programme.desc: When a beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff battles to save his shattered leg. Then, Dr. Amy takes on a new challenge treating seven bad-tempered chickens, and a tiny kitten found unconscious at a construction site unites everyone in a fight to save it.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free
programme.desc: Tania struggles to rescue a puppy that is hiding underneath a shed. A potential adopter comes to Villalobos hoping to find a companion for her dog, and she's only interested in seeing hounds. A beloved employee learns that he's finally off parole.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Wicked Bite
programme.desc: Jim Lane is picking blueberries alone in the Blue Ridge Mountains when a timber rattlesnake strikes. Teacher Rachael Lilienthal is swimming in a Florida river when an alligator bites down on her arm, pulls her underwater and doesn't let go.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan loves basketball and idolizes Michael Jordan. After finding a pair of sneakers with the initials 'MJ' inside, he suddenly has the ability to make superhuman jump shots and dunks just like his hero. He dreams of a big NBA career.

programme.title: Movie: Roll Bounce

programme.desc: When Will scores higher than Carlton on an intelligence test, Carlton resorts to cheating.

programme.title: Martin: Girlfriend
programme.desc: Gina's old friend, Monique, annoys everybody until Martin finds a way to expose Monique's insincerity.

programme.title: Martin: Romantic Weekend
programme.desc: Gina and Martin end up in the same island resort as Tommy and Pam. Each couple competes to have more fun.

programme.title: Martin: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Martin and Gina worry at their bachelor parties, and imagine what life will be like in five years.

programme.title: Martin: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is a Beach
programme.desc: Martin and Gina escape the pandemonium at home and finally have the perfect wedding ceremony.

programme.title: The Parkers: Out With the Old, In With the New
programme.desc: Stevie meets her mother's boyfriend, who shows an interest in his girlfriend's daughter.

programme.title: The Parkers: School of Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A bitter rivalry erupts when a local DJ picks Kim as their new on-air hottie with a body.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Prank King
programme.desc: Dre fears his holiday fun will be ruined when the older kids balk at the glorious Johnson Halloween tradition of seeing who can pull the most outlandish pranks on each other.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow find they always end up quarreling on their annual Valentine's Day date, this time around, Dre is determined to do everything right and keep the peace.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: In the near future, a cyber-enhanced human named Major is devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals. On the hunt for a new terrorist that can hack people, she discovers that her past is a lie, and she must solve the mystery of her life.

programme.title: Movie: After Earth
programme.desc: A young boy travels across the now abandoned planet Earth in search of a rescue beacon to save his father's life.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: Vampire death dealer Selene continues her struggle against the Lycans and Vampires that took everything from her. When she discovers the two factions are hunting her blood to become more powerful, she works to end the eternal war once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge
programme.desc: A family is held hostage for harbouring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a period in which any and all crime is legalized.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Counsellors are stalked and killed one by one by an unseen assailant at a newly re-opened summer camp that had been a murder site decades before.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 3
programme.desc: Recovering from his injuries of the previous film, Jason takes refuge at a Crystal Lake cottage, only to find more teenagers have arrived for vacation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Jason revives and returns to Camp Crystal Lake to murder its newest inhabitants, a carload of teenagers who've rented a house for the summer. A young boy with a penchant for monster make-up and effects may be the key to stopping Jason's current rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: Revived by an underwater electrical cable, Jason Voorhees lays waste to a cruise ship full of traveling teenagers on their way to New York to celebrate their high school graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood
programme.desc: A traumatized teenager with telekinetic abilities accidentally resurrects Jason while she vacations at Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VI: Jason Lives
programme.desc: Tommy Jarvis tries to destroy Jason's remains but accidentally resurrects him. Authorities in Crystal Lake, now renamed 'Forest Green' to distance themselves from Jason's past killing sprees, refuse to take Tommy seriously when Jason returns to town.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Five years after ending Jason Voorhees' killing spree, Tommy Jarvis now resides in a halfway house. When brutal murders start happening again, Tommy makes it his mission to find out if Jason has returned once more, and stop him if so.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Jason revives and returns to Camp Crystal Lake to murder its newest inhabitants, a carload of teenagers who've rented a house for the summer. A young boy with a penchant for monster make-up and effects may be the key to stopping Jason's current rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 3
programme.desc: Recovering from his injuries of the previous film, Jason takes refuge at a Crystal Lake cottage, only to find more teenagers have arrived for vacation.

programme.title: Love It or List It: The Impossible Dream House
programme.desc: Steve and Theresa custom-built their dream home on a large, private lot, but the house doesn't work for them anymore. Steve wants to fix the kitchen and master bathroom, but Theresa would rather find a smaller house.

programme.title: Love It or List It: This Space Is Looking Up
programme.desc: A couple bought their home ten years ago, but once they became a family of four, they struggled with the size of the house. David searches for a turnkey house, while Hilary designs 'outside the box' to solve all their space challenges.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Fan Faves: Touchdown in Poland
programme.desc: A job opportunity is bringing a young football player and coach to the Polish seaside city of Gdynia. With help from his friend, this laid-back bachelor looks for a place that is centrally located but not too expensive.

programme.title: House Hunters: Fan Faves: Bachelor Pad in Chicago
programme.desc: A bachelor searches for an upgrade from his cramped Chicago apartment. His sister thinks he should buy something in a high-amenity downtown high-rise, but he'd prefer to stay in his comfort zone near Lincoln Park.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Crowded House Hunt: An Island Dream and Slice of Italy
programme.desc: The crowd accompanies a newly engaged couple looking for a kitchen with their dream island. Then, they follow a young family looking for a backyard with enough space for their son to run around.

programme.desc: A Canadian bachelor wants to expand his chiropractic business in Utrecht, Netherlands. He hopes to find a home in the city center with plenty of outdoor and entertaining space, but with home prices skyrocketing, he may not get everything on his wish list.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a clean house in good shape that is aggressively priced in comparison to comparable properties in the area. But the reality of a dream listing doesn't always live up to the hype so they head over to check out the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Pig in a Poke
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a trust sale in Fullerton, California and make an offer on the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Lot Little Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a new listing in Buena Park, California that's small and run down but sits on a very large lot, offering possibilities for added value and increased profit.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Home Town: Big Renovation in a Small Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier love their small town of Laurel, Mississippi. They're passionate about making their town flourish like it did years ago. The best way they know how is to make Laurel a friendly and welcoming place to live.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Banquette Dreams
programme.desc: Virginia newlyweds look for a new place to call home in Mississippi. They have an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a banquette, a master bedroom and a spacious front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he moves away for a job, a man and his girlfriend try to keep make the long distance relationship work. But a new female coworker impersonates his girlfriend to show him that she isn't the girl for him after all.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Spirits Under Siege
programme.desc: Zak and the crew uncover dangerous paranormal activity at two abandoned locations in Civil War-scarred Vicksburg, Mississippi. First, a former Elks Lodge where an unsolved murder occurred. Then, a hospital with a history of disease and death.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Champion Hill Battlefield
programme.desc: Zak and the crew continue their Civil War investigation with the Battle of Champion Hill. Zak digs deep into the historic soil, which was the site of 6,000 casualties, and follows the trail of evil extending into the surrounding forest.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Lewis Flats School
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land in Deming, NM, to investigate a mysterious school situated on land that is soaked with the spirits of the Apache and their violent struggle to keep it from the pioneers during the 1800s.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hotel Leger

programme.desc: Zak and the crew are back in Virginia City, Nevada, to investigate the dark spirits haunting a historic brewery. A devastating fire and a short stint as a funeral home has stained the building, creating an energy unlike anything they've encountered.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Places
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle, Mexico's Zone of Silence, and Peru's Puerto de Hay Marko are some of the most mysterious places on Earth. Inexplicably, UFOs are often sited near these mystical areas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Angkor Wat, Cambodia, is the world's largest ancient religious temple. Within its megalithic ruins, researchers have discovered a depiction of a species of dinosaur: a stegosaurus.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysteries of the Sphinx
programme.desc: The Great Sphinx in Giza is the largest and most studied monolithic sculpture on Earth, yet it remains one of humanities greatest mysteries. This ancient monolith defies explanation and pre-dates our earliest known civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Today, we discuss ancient myths across a wide variety of cultures in which the gods are portrayed as intervening in human affairs. It is possible that these supernatural events may not be the work of gods, but rather proof of extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Mountain
programme.desc: A mysterious mountain in northern Italy has stood witness to strange sightings in the sky and unexplainable phenomena for hundreds of years.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Brain

programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glamorous Glamping Retreat
programme.desc: The team leaves their tents behind and head to New Jersey to build a campers retreat for an outdoor-loving couple. With a screened-in porch, a floating barbecue deck, and a cozy hanging bed, this Adirondack style tree-cabin puts glamping in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Jeffersonian Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: Pete and his patriots descend upon Virginia for the first time to bring the treehouse revolution to Bella Rose Plantation. Drawing on the architectural innovations of Thomas Jefferson, Pete designs a luxurious two-story treehouse with colonial columns.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.
