programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Outdoor Living Room
programme.desc: Miguel and Stephanie's overgrown yard is a mess, with its dilapidated pergola and a cracking concrete patio. Chris transforms the space into an outdoor living room complete with overlapping pergolas, a custom fire pit and a new grill.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chip Off the Old Chip/ Snow Bound
programme.desc: Timmy feels his voice won't work in a school play; Timmy and Vicki end up in an avalanche.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Force of Nature/ Viral Vidiots
programme.desc: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy. Timmy helps his mom make a viral video. Crocker sees it and thinks Mom is a magical Breakfast troll.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Oddlympics
programme.desc: Timmy and friends compete in an Olympics of their own to see who is most magical.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Indestructible Henry, Part 1
programme.desc: When Kid Danger is almost badly injured on a mission, Henry decides to go through the Densitizer and become indestructible like Captain Man. But things don't turn out quite the way Henry hopes they will.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones
programme.desc: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger and have him pilot his own drone.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Buster Moves/ To Cop or Not to Cop
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mas-termind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Game On!
programme.desc: It's not all fun and games when Devon's favourite video game is brought to life in the form of a new Robotron.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are accidentally locked in Bikini Bottom's first time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: Movie: Bedazzled

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Stalking Dead

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Negotiation Episode
programme.desc: Malik puts his foot down when Robin tells him to stop fooling around with other women.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Back to School
programme.desc: Mike finds that Mandy's steady boyfriend Kyle’s new interest in philosophy is distracting him from his work at The Outdoor Man Store. A solution may be in the offing when Mike gets a visit from Brody and Uncle Ray.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Maz Jobrani.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Miller vs. Alford
programme.desc: A former military expert interrogator, interrogates a woman to find out if she’s been cheating on her boyfriend with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Lose That Bad Boyfriend or Pay Me/ Dumb Home
programme.desc: Former judge Kevin Ross presides over various small claims cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: A Luge Mistake/ Ticketed Off
programme.desc: An injured street luge racer; a dispute between former roommates over a parking ticket.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Commons vs. Baker
programme.desc: After his girlfriend confesses to cheating with an ex, an Illinois man begins to doubt he is the father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Active Duty Drama/ Dumpster Dive
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for the return of property. Former roommates dispute a fine for illegal trash disposal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Angry Wives vs. Hot Mistresses
programme.desc: Ed wants his wedding day to be filled with joy by trying to make the love of his life Alexis his wife, but the feeling isn’t mutual. Why? Ed has cheated on Alexis on multiple occasions with various women including her good friend Bella.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman had a relationship with a man on and off for five years and they have two children together. She claims he physically abused her numerous times and she has the pictures to prove it. She’s now suing her ex for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Taking Too Darn Long, Being Shoddy and Not Checking The Engine.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Ditching An Ex' and 'Stiffing a Screenwriter.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Not So Idle Threats/ Little Black Book Full of Dirty
programme.desc: Harassment; books taken for a book drive contain surprises.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: In a dispute over $1900, the plaintiff says it was for a trip to take with the defendant while the defendants says it was for her to use as she chose. Tenants are sued for hoarding pets which caused damages; the defendants say it was the prior tenants.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Marry the Man Who Killed Your Father?
programme.desc: Lance and his fiancée’s father Andre got into an altercation that led to Andre becoming brain dead and eventually his death. Now Andre's family is questioning Nikki and believe she's covering up for Lance.

programme.title: Maury: Chemo Left Me Sterile ... I Can't Be Your Child's Father!
programme.desc: Jerry abandoned Netta while she was pregnant, and is denying her baby. Jeff is denying Stefanie's baby, saying a medical condition prevents him from having kids. Deondray says Shanndoria's pinning her baby on him due to his successful rap career.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Unhappily Ever After
programme.desc: Tera isn’t certain her marriage can be saved. Her husband, Roberto did the unthinkable by groping her friend Morgan’s breasts.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: The Beverly Hills Hoarder
programme.desc: A woman is so addicted to hoarding expensive goods that her fiancé says either the stuff goes or he does. Plus, a daughter gives an ultimatum to her hoarder mom.

programme.title: Movie: Religulous
programme.desc: Bill Maher interviews Christians, Catholics, Jews, Muslims, Mormons, scientists, gays and atheists in a documentary on how having faith in religion is ridiculous, as there are too many holes in the stories that create their beliefs.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Grosse Pointe Blank
programme.desc: A hitman returns home to do a little business and attend his high school reunion.

programme.title: Movie: Hedwig and the Angry Inch
programme.desc: A transgender punk rocker tours the United States in order to steal back her songs from her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Ever Forgive Me?
programme.desc: After her style of writing falls out of favour, a biographer finds herself broke and out of work. She beings forging letters by famous people and selling them, but when potential buyers begin to get suspicious she turns to stealing actual letters.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Bye Bye Love
programme.desc: Three divorced fathers struggle to bond with their children on weekends.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
